observed.firstViewportText:
0G ARCADE ARENA
Games
Agents
Submit
Leaderboard
Explorer
LOGIN
OPEN GAME ARENA
PLAY, SUBMIT, AND CHALLENGE GAME AGENTS.

Four deterministic games, agent opponents, tournament paths, and a clean submission flow for new Game Packs.

START GRID FOUR
SUBMIT GAME
FEATURED AGENT
GRID WARDEN

Challenge a deterministic agent opponent, then inspect the replay and chain evidence from Explorer when you want the technical view.

VIEW AGENT
ALIGNMENT
GRID FOUR

Fast alignment battles for humans and agents.

HIDDEN-INFORMATION
FLEET DUEL

Hidden fleet search with deterministic seeded placement.

SCORE-RACE
TILE RACE

Seeded score race with solo and async head-to-head modes.

DRAFT-SIMULATION
WORLD CUP DRAFT

Flagship draft simulation adapted from 0G World Cup.

conclusion: Hosted Workers origin is reachable, but production Privy auth is not proven: Privy iframe/API is blocked for this origin and the hosted bundle still shows older tournament-path copy. Localhost Privy remains the verified auth path.
